videos.title: Grimnir Digest #3: State-Backed Threats Unleashed
videos.description: Cyber threats are escalating at an alarming rate, with nation-state actors and commercial surveillance vendors exploiting vulnerabilities and using malware to target high-profile officials and international organizations. In this episode, we'll delve into the latest discoveries from Google's Threat Analysis Group, including the use of 0-day exploits and the expansion of Russian threat group COLDRIVER's targeting of Western officials. We'll also examine the exploitation of the WinRAR vulnerability and a 0-day used to target international government organizations. Full sources and analysis at grimnir.net — your daily cybersecurity intelligence hub. Subscribe for new episodes every day. #cybersecurity #infosec #hacking #grimnir #threatintelligence

videos.title: Grimnir Digest #2: Cyber Threats Escalate
videos.description: A massive phishing campaign targeting 130 firms has raised alarms globally. This episode covers the '0ktapus' threat group, a student loan breach, and rising ransomware attacks. Full sources and analysis at grimnir.net — your daily cybersecurity intelligence hub. Subscribe for new episodes every day. #cybersecurity #infosec #hacking #grimnir #threatintelligence

videos.title: Grimnir Digest #1: Cyber Threats Unleashed
videos.description: Join us for Grimnir Digest, your cinematic guide to the latest cybersecurity threats. This episode covers fake travel reservations, Twitter's security lapses, and critical vulnerabilities in Chrome, iPhone, and firewalls. #cybersecurity #infosec #grimnir
